purpose: Design options for deriving an evidence-based Mirror Candidate threshold in a future sprint. This file is design-only and does not implement or change thresholds.

recommended_next_sprint_designs.name: ROC-based threshold
recommended_next_sprint_designs.method: Use labeled replay samples to sweep candidate stability and component cutoffs, then select a boundary using sensitivity/specificity tradeoff.
recommended_next_sprint_designs.selection_rule_example: Choose the threshold maximizing Youden's J or preserving a minimum false-positive ceiling.

recommended_next_sprint_designs.name: Distribution separation threshold
recommended_next_sprint_designs.method: Model success and failure score distributions and select a boundary at the lowest-overlap region.
recommended_next_sprint_designs.selection_rule_example: Require minimum effect size plus low overlap before candidate verification.

recommended_next_sprint_designs.name: Percentile-based conservative gate
recommended_next_sprint_designs.method: Set candidate pass boundary from failure distribution percentiles, then require success samples to clear that boundary at a target repeat rate.
recommended_next_sprint_designs.selection_rule_example: Candidate passes only if success median exceeds failure p75 and success repeatability exceeds a predeclared rate.

recommended_next_sprint_designs.name: Bayesian decision boundary
recommended_next_sprint_designs.method: Estimate posterior probability that a candidate belongs to success rather than failure given component scores.
recommended_next_sprint_designs.selection_rule_example: Candidate passes only if posterior probability exceeds a predeclared confidence level on holdout replay samples.

minimum_future_evidence_requirements.success_samples: Greater than current 10-sample minimum; predeclare target before threshold derivation.
minimum_future_evidence_requirements.failure_samples: Greater than current 10-sample minimum with balanced failure archetypes.
minimum_future_evidence_requirements.holdout: Reserve unseen replay samples for threshold verification.
